averageScore.title: averageScore
averageScore.description: The average overall evaluation score for the selected time period. Use this to summarize the agent’s performance.

hasStatistics.title: hasStatistics
hasStatistics.description: Indicates whether any evaluation statistics were found.

totalEvaluations.title: totalEvaluations
totalEvaluations.description: The number of call evaluations found for the selected time period. Use this to tell the agent how many evaluations were included.
